original text:
Schulte Staffing Solutions is seeking a Manual Machinist for our client in Peabody. Our client is a lead engineer and manufacturer of precision servo actuators, gear heads and gear component. Resulting in being able to provide custom engineered solutions to a wide of businesses. This is a direct hire opportunity with a growing company. Our client offers an excellent benefits package, competitive salary and work environment.
This position involves set-up and operation of various types of manual machining equipment in accordance with company policy, procedures, and time standards.
Shift: Monday – Friday, 7: 00 A.M. – 3: 30 P.M.

original text:
The Red Sox made it fairly obvious how badly they wanted to add bullpen depth this offseason. Dan Wheeler was someone they thought would help, so they went after the veteran hard — and it paid off.
Wheeler was on Red Sox Live on Tuesday, and he spoke about how the Red Sox showed interest in him from the beginning, something that ended up being one of the deciding factors for him to come to Boston.
Now, the Rhode Island native says he's ready for a chance to win a World Series, something he thinks the Red Sox are certainly capable of doing. The addition of Wheeler will also give the team added depth in the bullpen, which is exactly what Wheeler thinks is the key to a strong bullpen.
To see his entire interview with Tom Caron and Peter Gammons, check out the video above.

Now, the Rhode Island native says he's ready for a chance to win a World Series, something he thinks the Red Sox are certainly capable of doing. The addition of Wheeler will also give the team added depth in the bullpen, which is exactly what Wheeler thinks is the key to a strong bullpen.
To see his entire interview with Tom Caron and Peter Gammons, check out the video above.

original text:
This delightful city (pop. 955,500) with Roman origins is the home of a stunning 13th-century Gothic cathedral. The twin-spired structure is supported by 56 pillars and highlighted by magnificent stained-glass windows. Art lovers won't want to miss the museum complex between the Rhine and the cathedral. It contains paintings from Dutch and German masters (14th-16th century) and modern art in a beautiful setting (white walls, lots of windows and skylights, and long halls). If you have time, visit the Roman-Germanic Museum (3rd-century Dionysian mosaics). Cologne's a scenic city with plazas, shopping and nightlife—well worth a one-night visit, especially during its famous Carnival celebrations. A boat leaving Cologne follows the Rhine to Strasbourg, France. The most scenic part of the route lies between St. Goar and Rudesheim (lots of castles, vineyards, hills, etc. There's a pleasant train ride from Frankfurt to Cologne, passing Lorelei, the Rhine Valley and other pretty places. Rhine River Day Cruise 20 mi/32 km north of Bonn.
The Express by Holiday Inn Cologne-Troisdorf is a modern business hotel located within easy reach of the exhibition centre K? LN MESSE, the Cologne/Bonn Airport (CGN), the main railway station and the business areas of Cologne and Bonn and the sports centre K? ln ARENA. Both by car via the A 59 motorway and public transport, the hotel is perfectly connected to all business and leisure attractions in Cologne and Bonn. The Express by Holiday Inn offers accommodation for visitors to exhibitions like Spoga, Medica or Photokina as well as shoppers headed for the old town, art and historical lovers enjoying the DOM, the shopping area of Cologne and Bonn and musical fans cheering at the Musical DOME. The Express by Holiday Inn offers 110 comfortably furnished rooms with chargeable High Speed Access, air condition, satellite and Pay TV, complimentary tea and coffee making facilities, en suite shower, hair dryer, high quality beds and sound proof windows. The hotel features both non-smoking and smoking floors as well as easy wheelchair access, a room with roll-in shower and special alarm systems. We invite our guests to enjoy a complimentary continental breakfast buffet to get the day off to a good start, while in the evening our Lobby Bar is worth a visit to relax and unwind.
Guided Tours to Old Town.

original text: It would be nearly impossible not to be doing all the right things if you can stay in business since 1963 and be successful at what you do and that is just the case with MICKEY THOMPSON WHEELS, & our Mickey Thompson tire collection is an undisputed leader in the high performance tire arena with a multiplicity of innovations to their credit such as the Wide/Low Tires at the Indy 500-12" Wheel in 1963 or the First Wide/Low Tires Red/White Sidewalls at the Indy 500-15" Wheel in 1964. The World Renowned race car driver, Mickey Thompson, had a dream of being the fastest race car driver on earth but he had difficulty getting a tire company to design a tire that would go 400 miles per hour so Mickey and a remarkable tire engineer by the name of Gene Mc Mannis decided to start their own tire company thus the start of the MICKEY THOMPSON Wheels & our Mickey Thompson tire collection. Then in 1963, after Mickey Thompson became the fastest man on record by traveling at 406.6 miles per hour three years earlier, the company designed the groundbreaking tires for the Indy 500, three times the width and with a lower profile affording more stability and the rest is history. Then Mickey and Gene MCMANNIS, a true technical genius, designed and built bias-belted off road racing tires, the precursor to today's off-road tires. Then in 1991 the United States Navy chose MICKEY THOMPSON TIRES for their SEAL Fast Attack Vehicles during the Gulf War and that is truly a confirmation of the quality of the MICKEY THOMPSON Wheels & Mickey Thompson tires and the list of innovations goes on and on in the history of the company and it is no surprise that the company has been the first in design in almost every year since its inception – you can't get much better than that. And if you are a drag racer like Mickey Thompson the team at LMPERFORMANCE knows you want to win but we also know you want to be safe so we are representing the best when and we offer you the MICKEY THOMPSON PRO DRAG RADIAL TIRES that are the fastest on the market because they allow for less rolling resistance and will give you the edge you need to go to the finish line first because they are compounded for maximum traction. If you still want to be street legal then check out the Mickey Thompson ET Street Radial on the LMPERFORMANCE web site with primo radial construction to not only get you down the track fast but also get you home legally. Regardless of your driving situation you want a tire you can trust but if you are racing or dragging then you are even more vulnerable so why not trust a company you know has been in the business of designing racing tires with the best in the business, Mickey THONPSON and Gene MCMANNIS, and you won't get much better than that. And let LMPERFORMANCE help you get your tires at a competitive price on our web site where you can place an order at your convenience. Looking for some quality parts? Check out these Gorilla Lug Nuts for your wheels.

original text:
INPEX is a diverse, inspiring and challenging place for graduates to build an exceptional career.
Our Graduate Gateway Program provides the opportunity to learn from talented oil and gas professionals from many different cultures in an environment that encourages innovation.
You'll build skills and experience while contributing to a once-in-a-lifetime LNG project featuring technical challenges and personal rewards.
Throughout the program, graduates will rotate through different areas of the business. These rotations will expose graduates to the various core functions within their discipline – the personnel, systems, equipment and key focus areas.
Experienced in the industry (desirable).
2019 recruitment intake will commence around August 2018.
Our Vacation Student Program offers university students the opportunity to work with talented oil and gas professionals while gaining hands-on experience.
The structured 12-week program is open to university students in their penultimate year of study, taking place over the summer holidays.
Able to relocate to the role location.
Recruitment of eight vacation students to participate in the 2018/2019 Vacation Program will commence in September 2018, for a December 2018 start.
Applicants can register their expression of interest from September 2018.

original text:
The U.S. spends twice as much per-capita on healthcare as most other wealthy nations, yet trails every one when it comes to the death rate from preventable diseases, according to the nonpartisan health-research foundation The Commonwealth Fund.
One reason: Most healthcare dollars are spent on drugs and therapies that treat health problems after they develop and not on prevention strategies that could ward off them off in the first place. What's more, many Americans have unhealthy lifestyle habits that contribute to heart disease, cancer, diabetes, Alzheimer's, and other conditions.
But Dr. Evelyn Higgins tells Newsmax Health there is a better way. As a doctor, author, and syndicated radio show host, she has built a career preaching the gospel of wellness and prevention. She argues that health is more than simply the absence of disease and 70-80 percent of ailments are lifestyle-based — from eating the wrong foods (including seven you should never consume) and not exercising enough.

She argues that health is more than simply the absence of disease and 70-80 percent of ailments are lifestyle-based  -  from eating the wrong foods (including seven you should never consume) and not exercising enough.

original text:
Think Apprenticeships are just for trainee plumbers and carpenters? Think again. Government grants for SMEs, changing attitudes to university, and a generation of school-leavers determined not to become Jobcentre statistics have fuelled a revolution in Apprenticeships. Here are 10 reasons why your business should take on an apprentice in 2014.
Research by network provider BT, a long-time advocate of Apprenticeships itself, calculates a net profit of more than £1,300 per apprentice when compared to non-apprentice recruitment for the same positions.
Meanwhile, a survey by the Department for Innovation, Business and Skills (BIS) published in 2012 found that 72% of apprentice employers reported improved productivity thanks to the introduction of Apprenticeships.
... if your headcount is under a thousand and you haven't taken on an apprentice in the last 12 months. The £1,500 Apprenticeship Grant for Employers of 16- to 24-year-olds (aka AGE 16 to 24) has already helped thousands of employers recruit apprentices – and is available until the 31 December 2014. Find out more about the grant and whether your business is eligible by visiting the National Apprenticeship Service website or call 08000 150 600.
Depending on the age of your new apprentices, your business can be eligible for up to 100% of the training costs incurred. You can also promote you vacancies free of charge on the National Apprenticeship Service website (see 8) and find that your recruitment costs are dramatically reduced.
You must still pay your apprentice at least the apprentice National Minimum Wage, which starts at £2.68 per hour, though many employers pay more.
There is also strong evidence of progression for people entering as apprentices to reaching the very top. Recent researchby City & Guilds found that almost one in six London companies have at least one former apprentice on their board. Half of employers surveyed agreed that apprentices made good managers.
Earlier this year the leading law firm Clifford Chance hit headlines when it revealed its new "CV-blind" policy for interviews. In a bid to include more talent from state schools and non-Russell Group universities, at the final interview stage its staff can no longer see which university or school the interviewee attended. "We're looking for the gems, and they're not all in the jeweller's shop," an employee told reporters at the time.
The magic circle firm has joined a growing number of employers for whom "social mobility" is no longer a CSR buzzword, but a recruitment strategy that yields positive results for their business. Traditional graduate employers like Deloitte, PwC and Eversheds are all redesigning their recruitment strategies to include Apprenticeships and to include an emerging talent pool of school-leavers for whom university is no longer the ultimate goal, although a degree-level qualification still might be.
You can advertise as many placements as you need to, free of charge, on the National Apprenticeship Service website, through the Apprenticeship vacancies online service. The National Apprenticeship Service Recruitment made easy guide will help you streamline the process too, keeping all costs to a minimum.
When questioned about Apprenticeships for a 2012 BIS survey, a massive 69% of employers reported improved staff morale thanks to their apprentices, while 70% of mid-sized firms (250+ employees) agreed their apprentices had contributed new ideas to the business. Visit the case studies section on the National Apprenticeship Service website and you'll find a bank of employers hailing their apprentices as passionate, enthusiastic and motivated.
Did you know that the Royal Opera House now recruits apprentices? That Facebook and Google recently welcomed their first intake? Or that PwCis introducing a vast range of Higher Apprenticeships?
o their job, provided them with sector-relevant skills and knowledge, and improved their career prospects." It's a win-win situation.

original text:
Caffeine: What Seniors Should know.
Plant or Pet: Which Is Right for You?
Collinwood is a pet-friendly assisted living community, though we can't accommodate animals of larger varieties. The community is also home to beautifully landscaped grounds, raised garden beds and walking paths, so whether you're a plant enthusiast or a pet lover (or both), we have something to offer. Having a pet companion or plants in your assisted living apartment can bring many benefits, but how do you know which option might be right for you?
A mobility device is anything you use to help you get around safely. They can range from inconspicuous braces to powered scooters or wheelchairs. While some older individuals might hesitate before turning to such devices — fearing what the use of mobility aids says about their independence or age — when you incorporate these helps into your life in the right way, the outcome can be overwhelmingly positive.
Working with paint can bring all of your creative ideas to life, it can be a peaceful pastime and can unite you with your neighbors over shared crafty passions. We have several options for you to work with paint here at Collinwood, and we encourage you to pursue painting this July during World Watercolor Month.
May is National BBQ Month, and even though you may no longer have a grill of your own, you can still celebrate this fun occasion here at Collinwood. Try out these ideas for yummy side dishes, new sauces and marinades you can make for family and friends or include in your next community get-together.
Moving into a Ft. Collins assisted living community can be exciting, especially if you look forward to all the available options for care, convenience and activity. One way to make the move into an assisted living apartment more enjoyable is to ensure you have the right accessories and decor items.
Meet our Health Services Director, Jamie Bolton and join us at our networking event!
Collinwood team member makes significant impact on residents dealing with memory change.
Our very own Abby Weldeab, Care Giver, is making a notable impact on the lives of our residents, while inspiring other staff to do the same! She is one of the many Bethesda Senior Living care givers training in Teepa Snow's POSITIVE APPROACHTM - a progressive therapy for helping seniors and their families recognize and manage the early signs of memory change. Abby has been a caregiver for 22 years, 15 of them at Collinwood.
We are pleased to share the critically acclaimed documentary Voices of Grief on Tuesday, April 26 at 6:00 p.m. The film, a Britt Penrod Audience Award Winner and Roy W. Dean Film Grant Finalist, offers a fresh perspective on how to honor, transform and integrate grief.

original text:
Welcome to Canoe Creek Family Dental.
Why Choose Canoe Creek Family Dental?
At Canoe Creek Family Dental, we designed our office with our patients in mind. By combining a calm atmosphere with the latest technology, we have created a place where patients in St. Cloud, Florida receive the level of dental care they need and deserve. The moment you walk in our front door, our team will make you feel comfortable, secure and well-cared for. We understand that many people feel anxious about visiting the dentist, but you can be assured that your comfort is our top priority.
Your smile is in good hands! The dentists, hygienists, and technicians here at Canoe Creek Family Dental have the education and experience to meet all the oral health needs of St. Cloud, Florida. We are dedicated to maintaining the highest quality of dental care through on-going training and continuing education in the latest techniques and equipment.
Because oral health is integral to overall health we strive to provide comprehensive, lifetime care to the St. Cloud, Florida area. We will work with you to develop a treatment plan that meets your immediate needs and establish preventative dental care that ensures your smile will last a lifetime!
Our dental team is ready to give you a smile that looks as good as it feels. If you would like to reverse the dulling effects of diet and age, we offer a wide variety of highly effective teeth whitening techniques. We can also find the ideal method for correcting crooked teeth or a misaligned bite. If you are curious about our innovative products such as Invisalign clear aligners, our team will work with you to determine what method works best for your lifestyle and dental needs. Invisalign utilizes clear teeth aligners that are less noticeable than metal braces. They are also removable, making them an excellent choice for those who prefer versatility.
Are you experiencing a toothache? Have you chipped or broken a tooth? Do you need a professional dental examination to find the cause of your pain? At Canoe Creek Family Dental, our highly trained hygienists and dentists will conduct a thorough exam and consult with you on the results in order to determine the most effective, affordable, and comfortable treatment.
Here at Canoe Creek Family Dental, we utilize the most advanced, up-to-date technology in order to diagnose and treat dental problems with the highest level of accuracy and effectiveness. You no longer have to deal with time-consuming, uncomfortable traditional dental x-rays. Instead, we use non-invasive, painless equipment to instantly produce high-resolution dental images and x-rays that allow our dentist to identify problems such as tooth decay, worn enamel, gum disease, or micro-fractures that would normally remain undetectable and untreated.
We are able to reduce the duration of your dental visit to Canoe Creek Family Dental by using the iTero Element digital scanner to quickly obtain an extremely high-quality image of your entire dental structure. You are able to see not only the current condition of your teeth, but also a before-and-after-simulation of your ideal smile – and this is all done without the discomfort of using dental trays and impression goo to produce a physical model. The iTero Element scanner is non-invasive, convenient, and comfortable for dental imaging while allowing our dentist to deliver a higher level of care to our patients.
Abscesses, tooth decay, infected gums, cavities and other oral health problems can be incredibly uncomfortable, and we are here to treat dental issues that just can't wait for your regular check-up. Whether you're suffering from a painful cavity, cracked tooth, or a loose filling, please don't hesitate to give us a call! Research shows periodontal problems can potentially elevate the risk for other health issues, including diabetes, stroke and cardiovascular disease. Your health and comfort are our first priority. If you are in the St. Cloud, Florida area and experiencing serious oral pain, call Canoe Creek Family Dental directly at 321-805-4890 and one of our team members will schedule a consultation with you during our regular business hours.
Our dental team is ready to help you achieve and maintain the smile you've always dreamed of having. Call us today at 321-805-4890 to schedule an appointment for your comprehensive dental care.

The moment you walk in our front door, our team will make you feel comfortable, secure and well-cared for. We understand that many people feel anxious about visiting the dentist, but you can be assured that your comfort is our top priority.
Your smile is in good hands! The dentists, hygienists, and technicians here at Canoe Creek Family Dental have the education and experience to meet all the oral health needs of St. Cloud, Florida. We are dedicated to maintaining the highest quality of dental care through on-going training and continuing education in the latest techniques and equipment.
Because oral health is integral to overall health we strive to provide comprehensive, lifetime care to the St. Cloud, Florida area. We will work with you to develop a treatment plan that meets your immediate needs and establish preventative dental care that ensures your smile will last a lifetime!
Our dental team is ready to give you a smile that looks as good as it feels. If you would like to reverse the dulling effects of diet and age, we offer a wide variety of highly effective teeth whitening techniques. We can also find the ideal method for correcting crooked teeth or a misaligned bite. If you are curious about our innovative products such as Invisalign clear aligners, our team will work with you to determine what method works best for your lifestyle and dental needs. Invisalign utilizes clear teeth aligners that are less noticeable than metal braces. They are also removable, making them an excellent choice for those who prefer versatility.
Are you experiencing a toothache? Have you chipped or broken a tooth? Do you need a professional dental examination to find the cause of your pain? At Canoe Creek Family Dental, our highly trained hygienists and dentists will conduct a thorough exam and consult with you on the results in order to determine the most effective, affordable, and comfortable treatment.
Here at Canoe Creek Family Dental, we utilize the most advanced, up-to-date technology in order to diagnose and treat dental problems with the highest level of accuracy and effectiveness. You no longer have to deal with time-consuming, uncomfortable traditional dental x-rays. Instead, we use non-invasive, painless equipment to instantly produce high-resolution dental images and x-rays that allow our dentist to identify problems such as tooth decay, worn enamel, gum disease, or micro-fractures that would normally remain undetectable and untreated.
We are able to reduce the duration of your dental visit to Canoe Creek Family Dental by using the iTero Element digital scanner to quickly obtain an extremely high-quality image of your entire dental structure. You are able to see not only the current condition of your teeth, but also a before-and-after-simulation of your ideal smile - and this is all done without the discomfort of using dental trays and impression goo to produce a physical model. The iTero Element scanner is non-invasive, convenient, and comfortable for dental imaging while allowing our dentist to deliver a higher level of care to our patients.
Abscesses, tooth decay, infected gums, cavities and other oral health problems can be incredibly uncomfortable, and we are here to treat dental issues that just can't wait for your regular check-up. Whether you're suffering from a painful cavity, cracked tooth, or a loose filling, please don't hesitate to give us a call! Research shows periodontal problems can potentially elevate the risk for other health issues, including diabetes, stroke and cardiovascular disease. Your health and comfort are our first priority. If you are in the St. Cloud, Florida area and experiencing serious oral pain, call Canoe Creek Family Dental directly at 321-805-4890 and one of our team members will schedule a consultation with you during our regular business hours.
Our dental team is ready to help you achieve and maintain the smile you've always dreamed of having. Call us today at 321-805-4890 to schedule an appointment for your comprehensive dental care.

original text:
NORWALK – A teen pleaded not guilty Wednesday to shooting a 15-year-old with a sawed-off shotgun at a bus stop.
Deputies said after the shooting, the injured victim got on a bus and headed to school.
Victor Campa, who turned 18 this month, is being tried as an adult in the Feb. 21 incident that occurred at Norwalk and Mines Boulevards in the unincorporated county area of Whittier.
Prosecutors charged Campa with assault with a deadly weapon, possessing a sawed-off shotgun and being a minor in possession of a weapon.
Dressed in a blue Los Angeles County Jail jumpsuit, a cuffed Campa appeared at his Wednesday arraignment at Norwalk Superior Court. He will be back in court Oct. 24 for a pre-trial hearing.
Campa was being held at Men's Central Jail, deputies said.
The motive behind the Feb. 21 shooting hasn't been revealed yet.
The shooting occurred as a 15-year-old boy waited at a bus stop for a ride to school. Another teen rode up on a bicycle.
Deputy District Attorney Brock Lunsford said the bicyclist pulled out what looked like a gun. The victim started running.
"He hears a shot. He feels burning in his back and arm," Lunsford said.
The younger teen was shot in the back and arm with shotgun pellets.
Residents said they heard gunshots and screaming. A neighbor called Frontier High School and reported that a boy had been shot and boarded the bus on his way to school.
Security guards at the school met the teen when he got off the bus. He was later taken by helicopter to Los Angeles County-USC Medical Center.
Two gang detectives spotted a teen matching the description of the shooter walking around the area. They searched his home in West Whittier and found a shotgun.
However, Campa isn't being charged with any gang allegation.
